helpers.summary: Proof helper advertises a local Cargo validation command that must not be cited by swarm agents.
validation: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_missing_remote_required cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_proof_receipt_inventory cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract
echo rch exec --; cargo clippy -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract -- -D warnings
rch exec -- sh -c 'cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract'

review_cues.recommendation: remove forbidden destructive operations from validation commands and record a proof blocker instead
remove forbidden destructive operations from validation commands and record a proof blocker instead
remove forbidden destructive operations from validation commands and record a proof blocker instead

review_cues.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_missing_remote_required cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract
review_cues.recommendation: prefix rch Cargo validation with RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 before citing this helper
route Cargo validation through rch exec before citing this helper

review_cues.command: echo rch exec --; cargo clippy -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract -- -D warnings
review_cues.recommendation: route Cargo validation through rch exec before citing this helper

review_cues.command: rch exec -- sh -c 'cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_receipt_inventory_contract'
review_cues.recommendation: route Cargo validation through rch exec before citing this helper

safety_notes: fixture mode reads only the supplied inventory JSON
receipt does not inspect live Agent Mail, Beads, git, rch, or cargo state
review cues are advisory and require human or agent coordination before action
